name: pin_control_id_in_path_only
description: RE-RECORDED 2026-06-07 as the regression-gate proof of the path-only deceptive-filename fix. Pre-fix, _CONTROL_ID_RE scanned BOTH text and evidence.path; with empty body text and only the path containing 'AC-2', the tagger tagged every child Objective of ac-2 at 0.7/0.5. That was a rename attack — a user wanting credit on AC-2/RA-5/SC-7 could upload a file named 'AC-2_RA-5_SC-7_kitchen_sink.pdf' with arbitrary contents and harvest tags. Post-fix, Tier 3 scans the text body ONLY; path-only matches produce zero tags. CCI-000015 (the ac-2 child) must NOT be tagged. A regression that re-adds the `for m in _CONTROL_ID_RE.finditer(evidence.path or "")` line resurrects the attack and trips this case.
